channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: U.S. senators urge Treasury not to leave states out of GENIUS Act stablecoin process
item.description: Senators led by Republican Cynthia Lummis are insisting the Treasury Department ensure states get a process to prove their ability to supervise stablecoins....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.description: A new Android banking trojan named Rokarolla is targeting 217 banking and cryptocurrency applications using an extensive set of 137 commands. [...]...

item.title: JLR ordered 30,000 staff to reset passwords in person after cyberattack
item.description: Aimee Turner reports: Jaguar Land Rover ordered all 30,000 employees to reset their passwords in person following a cyberattack that raised concerns staff credentials had been compromised. Speaking at...

item.title: The Onboarding Password Mistake That Creates Unnecessary Risk
item.description:
Employee onboarding is a busy time for IT teams. New starters need devices, accounts, access permissions, and passwords, all delivered within a tight timeframe.
That usually means sharing a temporary...

item.title: 152 Chrome Wallpaper Extensions with 105K Installs Linked to Adware and Fake Traffic
item.description:
Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a network of 152 Google Chrome extensions that act as new tab live wallpaper add-ons to distribute a potentially unwanted program (PUP) family.
The cluster s...

item.title: AU: American Express ordered to fix security gaps after customer was spied on

item.title: Popular WordPress Plugin Scripts Tampered to Plant Hidden Backdoors on Sites
item.description:
An attacker tampered with trusted JavaScript files used by WordPress sites running PushEngage, OptinMonster, and TrustPulse, turning those files into a way to break into the sites.
When a site admini...

item.title: What Happened to Cardano’s Missing 1,096 Bitcoin? Hoskinson Gives His Answer
item.description: Charles Hoskinson said the disputed 1,096 BTC was used in 2016 to pay for auditing services related to Cardano’s early crowdsale. According to Hoskinson, the ......
